corrections_to_prior_ack.icescr_signing_date: Turn 9 listed 'Fix ICESCR signing date: 1977 → 1979' per F-D9. Verified against UN Treaty Collection: U.S. signed ICESCR October 5, 1977. The 1977 date is correct. No change applied.
